title: Le Hoan Fighting the Song Army
summary: In 981, General Le Hoan ascended the throne and led the Dai Co Viet army and people to defeat the Song invasion, protecting the nation's independence.

slides.text: The country was in danger when the Song army invaded. Queen Mother Duong Van Nga handed the royal robe to the Commander-in-Chief of the Ten Armies, Le Hoan.
slides.imagePrompt: Queen Mother Duong Van Nga handing the royal robe to General Le Hoan, historical ceremony, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Le Hoan directly led the troops into battle, using clever strategies to defeat the enemy on both land and water.
slides.imagePrompt: King Le Hoan in armor leading his army in battle, brave and strong, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He ordered his troops to fake a surrender to lure the enemy into a trap, then launched a surprise attack that led to the Song army's defeat.
slides.imagePrompt: Vietnamese soldiers launching a surprise attack against Song army, confusion in enemy ranks, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Following the victory, he focused on agricultural development. The Early Le Dynasty helped the country live in peace.
slides.imagePrompt: The King plowing a field during 'Tich Dien' festival, promoting agriculture, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Which invading army did Le Hoan defeat?
What title did Le Hoan take when he ascended the throne?
